class LanguageServicesFacade {

    + convertUri2PathPMTextDocumentToConvert(pmTextDocument: PMTextDocument, uri2path?: boolean): PMTextDocument
    + init(docs: PMTextDocument[], pluginDir: string): Promise<LanguageServicesFacade>
}

    + init(docs: PMTextDocument[], pluginDir: string): Promise<LanguageServices>
}

    + getAllDefinitionsDGNode(cache: PolicyModelEntity[], name: string): Location[]

}

    + getAllReferencesSlotValue(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]

}
